rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers in component type contracts
Move invalid implementation-level references to the implementation annex or delete them
generic_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use only visible identifiers in component type contracts
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Move invalid implementation-level references to the implementation annex or delete them
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Component type contracts may reference only features visible at that type scope
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not place subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like 'integer' or 'boolean'
